Description: Serial number of the AudioMoth device that took the recordings and generated this file.
Notes 1: File is a plain text file with each variable listed on a different line.  Each line has a ":" delimiting the data name from its value.  All values are initially strings byt the data type denotes the suggested data type when parsed.  There are some blank lines in the file for formatting purposes.
Notes 2: Device ID contains numbers and letters.
Notes 3: The AudioMoth's serial number is designated at the factory and is not the same as the ESID# that the Eclipse Soundscapes team assigned to the device

Variable Name: Use daily folder for WAV files
Description: Variable denotes whether separate data folders are created for each day of the AudioMoth's recording.
Code Meaning: Yes: Generate daily folders for .WAV files, No: Put all generated .WAV files into the top level folder.
Notes 1: File is a plain text file with each variable listed on a different line.  Each line has a ":" delimiting the data name from its value.  All values are initially strings byt the data type denotes the suggested data type when parsed.  There are some blank lines in the file for formatting purposes.
Notes 2: All Eclipse Soundscapes Data is expected to have "No", but settings may differ based on data collector usage.
